changelog:
Viumo 1.0.5

Your watch experience, upgraded.

- Continue watching — pick up right where you left off, no searching needed

- Subtitles now available for online viewers

- Immersive watch mode for a full focus experience

- Stabilised picture-in-picture (PiP) for smooth background viewing

- Bug report and Help Center in your profile — reach us instantly

Viumo remembers where you are.

Keep watching, keep enjoying.
